title: DOWN PAYMENT LOAN ASSISTANCE PROGRAM - 211info
text: GOVERNMENT OFFICE DOWN PAYMENT LOAN ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides first-time homebuyers with up to $15,000 for down payment or closing cost assistance. The loan is forgivable after five years if the buyer remains in the home. If the buyer moves out before then, they must repay a prorated portion of the loan. 1245 Fulton Avenue Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Must be a low to moderate income registered tribal member and must be listed on the deed of the house Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 888-9577 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Application (541) 888-9577 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Submit application online or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Home Purchase/Construction Financing/Refinancing * Native American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - EMERGENCY ASSISTANCE/HOMELESS PREVENTION HOUSING/SHELTER - HOME REPAIR PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - RENTAL ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - TRIBAL HOUSING INFORMATION SERVICES - TRIBAL MEMBER SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CIRCLES OF HEALING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GOVERNMENT OFFICE
